{{Quote|World presidents, too, can despise an interstellar tyrant!|Natala Vanden|<ref name="world" />}}
'''Natala Vanden''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Vorzydiak]] who served as [[President/Legends|President]] of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. With her [[Planet/Legends|planet]] buckling under heavy [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] taxes levied by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Vanden began secret dealings with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], becoming their high-level contact within the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] government. Vanden went so far as to clandestinely meet with rebel leader [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], although it was interrupted by a sudden [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] attack.

==Biography==
{{Quote|And you are Luke Skywalker! I am honored to meet so brave a Rebel... and one so young-!|Natala Vanden, to Luke Skywalker|<ref name="world" />}}
A [[Vorzydiak]], Natala Vanden was the [[President/Legends|President]] of her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Under the rule of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Vorzyd V had become a crucial world to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], as it heavily taxed the planet's [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] revenues and used them to finance its operations. By [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], this had driven Vanden to consider defecting to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and she set up a secret line of communication with the leader of the Rebel cell in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]], a [[Squalris]] businessman named [[Sanglui]] who had vowed to protect her identity with his life. Eventually, the opportunity to disrupt the Empire's operations attracted prominent Rebel leaders [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to the "Gambler's World," and Vanden requested a clandestine meeting with one of the visitors.<ref name="world" />

[[File:VandenSkywalker.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Natala Vanden meets Luke Skywalker.]]
Skywalker was chosen to meet with Vanden, although her identity was still kept secret, and the only information given to the young man was a series of very detailed instructions about how to reach the meeting place. This was for a reason: Skywalker was being followed by [[Shadow stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] working directly for the shadowy [[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Director]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] known only as [[Cronal|Blackhole]], and the route Vanden told Skywalker to take contained numerous roadblocks, agents and tricks meant to ensure Skywalker lost his tail. Skywalker finally came out of a [[grav tube]] to come face to face with the contact, Vanden, whom he immediately recognized as the planet's President. Without much time to talk, Vanden quickly outlined her plan to redirect the money coming out of Vorzyd V's [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] away from the Empire and back to the planet's people, which would involve another secret meeting deep beneath Efavan where Vanden would directly hand Skywalker millions of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="world" />

However, Vanden and Skywalker's meeting was cut off there, as the room in which they were speaking was suddenly attacked by stormtroopers who had figured out their location. While her bodyguards moved to protect the President, Vanden immediately responded by triggering a robotic arm that pushed Skywalker down another grav tube to his escape.<ref name="world" />

==Personality and traits==
As President of Vorzyd V, Vanden chafed under Imperial rule, despising the tyranny of the Emperor and looking to ensure that the planet's gambling profits would be used to benefit the people. Vanden respected and admired Luke Skywalker, having been previously familiar with his deeds fighting for the Rebels, and felt honored to meet him.<ref name="world" />

==Behind the scenes==
Natala Vanden first appeared in ''[[Gambler's World]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] story arc written and illustrated by [[Russ Manning]] and released in [[1979]], although she originally went unnamed.<ref name="world" /> Over 30 years later, her name was finally given in the third part of ''[[The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire]]'', a series of [[StarWars.com]] blog posts written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="warlords">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-3|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 3|nolive=1}}</ref>
